description: Calculate the cumulative energy demand for producing 1,000 liters of tap water using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Identify a municipal tap water or water supply process and perform an LCIA for a functional unit of 1,000 liters using an energy-related method such as TRACI 2.1 or Cumulative Energy Demand. Export the detailed LCIA results to ~/LCA_Results/water_energy_demand.csv and create a summary text file at ~/LCA_Results/water_energy_summary.txt including the Process Name, the Functional Unit (1000 L), and the Total Energy Demand in MJ.
